span.p:
PokemonDetail
• id, name, spriteUrl
• types, stats, abilities
• moves: List‹PokemonMove› (level-up only)
• tmMoves: List‹String› (machine/egg/tutor)
• evolutionChain, flavorText
• height, weight

Move
• name, type, category
• power, accuracy, pp
• effectText
• learnedBy, totalLearnersCount

span.p: ⚙️ Battle Engines (pure objects — no Android deps)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BattleEngine
• startBattle(player, opponent, gen)
• buildBattlePokemon(detail, level, moves)
• resolveTurn(playerAction, aiAction, state, gen)
• aiPickMove(pokemon)
• computeHp(base, level)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
DamageEngine
• calculate(DamageParams) → DamageResult
• computeEffectiveness(gen, moveType, defTypes)
• isPhysicalGen23(type)
Gen-accurate formulas Gen 1–9
31 IVs assumed; EV-aware

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SettingsViewModel
• syncAll() → all 1025 detail
• syncTeamMoves() → prefetch
top-4 moves for team

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PokemonRepository
(single source of truth)
──────────────────
getPokemonList() cache-first
getPokemonDetail(id) cache-first
searchPokemon(nameOrId)
getMove(name) cache-first
syncAll(onProgress) batch all 1025
syncTeamMoves(teamIds) prefetch top-4 moves
setCaught / getCaughtPokemon
getCachedTypes(id)
getDexDescription(name)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SettingsRepository
──────────────────
team: List‹Int› (up to 6 ids)
musicOnLaunch: Boolean
selectedGen: Int (1–9)
searchHistory: List‹String› (last 10)
